data.title: STARTRADER sponsors UAE National Cricket Team for ICC 2026 T20 World Cup; partnership renewed; tourney begins Feb 7.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 15, 2026, STARTRADER, an international broker, reveals a fresh collaboration with the UAE Men's National Cricket Team for the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 starting on February 7, 2026. Under the agreement, STARTRADER's branding will...

data.title: Ericsson plans staff cuts in Sweden, aiming to enhance competitiveness. Global cost-saving measures in progress.
data.description: In Stockholm on January 15, 2026, Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) disclosed plans to reduce its workforce in Sweden as a strategic move to enhance the company's competitiveness. This reduction forms part of a larger global effort to enhance cost efficiency. The exact number of staff members expected to be affected by the reduction has not been specified.

data.title: Munich launches ReMuc – "Ois im Kreis" project for reusable food containers by Relevo from Duni Group. Circular initiative takes step towards sustainable future.
data.description: In an effort to promote sustainability, the city of Munich in Germany has initiated the ReMuc – "Ois im Kreis" project, aimed at creating a circular economy. Spearheaded by Relevo, a company owned mostly by Duni, the project introduces a digital system for reusable food containers. This marks a significant advancement towards reducing waste and encouraging eco-friendly practices in Munich.

data.title: ARK ETFs impacted by Q4 crypto decline, Coinbase top detractor, highlights close tie to digital assets.
data.description: In the last quarter, a decrease in the crypto market revealed the increasing correlation between ARK's primary ETFs and digital assets. This downturn was primarily influenced by Coinbase and Roblox, which were the leading factors affecting performance.
JAPAN FINMIN KATAYAMA: FISCAL REFORM IMPOSSIBLE WITHOUT ECONOMIC GROWTH

data.title: Trump won't remove Powell as Federal Reserve chair during DOJ probe. Considering Kevin Warsh or Kevin Hassett as replacements.
data.description: President Trump has confirmed that he will not be firing Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell, despite an ongoing federal investigation. In an interview with Reuters, Trump mentioned that the administration is currently undecided on its next steps regarding Powell, but hinted at considering either former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh or National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett as potential replacements. He ruled out U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for the position. The President stated that it is too early to provide further details and indicated that the situation is in a holding pattern. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global release of the 1 episode x 30 minutes documentary "Through Ice and Snow" by China Review Studio and Yingda Media Investment Group Company, Ltd. starts on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, the documentary "Through Ice and Snow" made in partnership by China Review Studio and Yingda Media Investment Group Company, Ltd., consisting of one 30-minute episode, will be released worldwide on various platforms.

data.title: Tim Henneberry joins New Earth Resources advisory board, with 45 years’ experience in mining. Appointed as Director in many companies.
data.description: New Earth Resources Corp. has appointed Tim Henneberry to its advisory board. Mr. Henneberry, a Professional Geoscientist with 45 years of experience in domestic and international exploration, has worked in various capacities with several junior mining companies. He has been a founding director and CEO of TSX.V and CSE junior miners and currently serves as a director for companies like Silver Sands Resources Corp. and iMetal Resources Inc. He is also a technical advisor for several mining companies. Mr. Henneberry's expertise in uranium, precious and base metals, and industrial minerals will be invaluable to New Earth Resources Corp. as they continue their exploration and production efforts.

data.title: LIFT Power reports 26m intersect at 1.56% Li2O at Yellowknife Lithium Project, NWT. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Li-FT Power Ltd. has shared the outcomes of its 2025 work program at the Yellowknife Lithium Project in Northwest Territories. The company, listed as LIFT on TSXV, LIFFF on OTCQX, and WS0 on Frankfurt, expressed contentment with the results. The project is situated outside Yellowknife city.

data.title: Tivoli reports strong 2025 with 4.3M guests, highest since pre-COVID. Raises expectations for 2026.
data.description: Tivoli has wrapped up 2025 with a successful Christmas season, enjoying strong performance. The popular attraction welcomed a total of 4.3 million visitors throughout the year, reaching its highest attendance level since before the COVID-19 outbreak.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services to attend & speak at 2026 Boating Industry Elevate Summit in Lake Buena Vista, Florida.
data.description: A leading dealership buy-sell entity, Performance Brokerage Services, disclosed that its Marine Division has confirmed participation and speaking engagement at the 2026 Boating Industry Elevate Summit scheduled from January 18 to 20 in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. The event will take place in IRVINE, California, and is set to gather industry professionals and experts for insightful discussions and networking opportunities. Performance Brokerage Services continues to display dominance in dealership transactions and ventures, showcasing expertise in the sector.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services to speak at 2026 Powersports Business Accelerate Conference in Florida. Dates: Jan 18-20.
data.description: Performance Brokerage Services, a prominent player in dealership acquisitions, has revealed that its Powersports Division is set to participate in and make an appearance at the 2026 Powersports Business Accelerate Conference. The event is scheduled to take place from January 18 to 20 in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. The company, based in Irvine, California, made this announcement on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services will be speaking at the 2026 AED Summit in Dallas, Texas on January 19-21.
data.description: A prominent dealership buy-sell activity company, Performance Brokerage Services, recently disclosed that its Equipment & Commercial Truck Division is set to participate and present at the AED Summit in Dallas, Texas from January 19 to 21, 2026. The event will take place in Irvine, Calif., and serves as a notable platform for industry professionals. Performance Brokerage Services aims to showcase its expertise and engage with attendees at this important gathering.

data.title: Kavalan unveils 2026 Lunar New Year Exclusive: Golden Steed & Peonies whisky gift set. Tribute to Year of the Horse.
data.description: Celebrating the Year of the Horse, Kavalan, the renowned whisky distillery in Taiwan, has launched a special edition for the 2026 Lunar New Year named Golden Steed & Peonies. This exclusive release showcases symbolic artistry and the distinctive complexity of their single malt whisky. Limited in availability, this tribute to the year is set to captivate enthusiasts.

data.title: Thredd partners with Paywith for next-gen card programs in Australia, combining expertise for flexible launches.
data.description: In Sydney today, it was announced that Thredd, a prominent global payments processor, has successfully launched its initial program in collaboration with Paywith, a top payment orchestration platform. This partnership merges Paywith's payment orchestration technology with Thredd's local market knowledge and adaptable infrastructure, empowering businesses to efficiently introduce versatile, customer-focused card programs swiftly and assuredly.
